description: Canonical hook inventory. Renderers translate each record into the host's native format. Events use snake_case canonical ids and host allow-lists convert to native event keys. V3 records use explicit handler objects; v2 command records are accepted only as a compatibility path.

shared.description: Universal pre-tool guardrail. Blocks destructive invocations such as --no-verify, force-push-to-main, and wildcard home deletion. Opt out per-session with AGENT_FORGE_GUARDIAN=off.

claude.description: Dormant v3 schema example for Claude HTTP hook rendering.
Dormant v3 schema example for Claude MCP tool hook rendering.
Dormant v3 schema example for Claude prompt hook rendering.

handler.prompt: Review the hook input JSON and return a yes/no JSON decision.

claude.description: Dormant v3 schema example for Claude agent hook rendering.

handler.prompt: Inspect the changed files and report whether a policy issue exists.
